---
title: "BioClockR Phase 2 - Model Building Report"
author: "Naresh Gumala"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
nhanes_model <- readRDS("C:/Users/Naresh Gumala/Documents/GitHub/BioClockR/data-raw/model_output/nhanes_model.rds")
```

## 1. Biomarker Distributions

```{r biomarker_dist, echo=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
library(tidyr)
nhanes_model %>%
  select(albumin, creatinine, glucose, crp, lymphocyte, mcv, rdw, alkphos, wbc) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "biomarker", values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "steelblue", color = "white", alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales = "free") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of 9 PhenoAge Biomarkers",
       x = "Value", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 2. Biomarker Correlation with Age

```{r biomarker_age_corr, echo=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
nhanes_model %>%
  select(age, albumin, creatinine, glucose, crp, lymphocyte, mcv, rdw, alkphos, wbc) %>%
  pivot_longer(-age, names_to = "biomarker", values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "red", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = "Biomarker Values vs Chronological Age",
       x = "Age (years)", y = "Value") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 3. Age Acceleration by BMI Group

```{r accel_bmi, echo=FALSE}
# Use glucose as a proxy for metabolic health groups
nhanes_model %>%
  mutate(glucose_group = case_when(
    glucose < 5.6  ~ "Normal",
    glucose < 7.0  ~ "Pre-diabetic",
    glucose >= 7.0 ~ "Diabetic"
  )) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = glucose_group, y = age_accel, fill = glucose_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Biological Age Acceleration by Glucose Status",
       subtitle = "Higher glucose associated with faster biological aging",
       x = "Glucose Group", y = "Age Acceleration (years)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

## 4. Biological Age vs Chronological Age by Sex

```{r bio_age_sex, echo=FALSE}
ggplot(nhanes_model, aes(x = age, y = bio_age, color = sex)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Biological Age vs Chronological Age by Sex",
       subtitle = "Dashed line = perfect match",
       x = "Chronological Age (years)",
       y = "Biological Age (years)") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 5. Model Summary Statistics

```{r model_summary, echo=FALSE}
nhanes_model %>%
  group_by(sex) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_bio_age   = round(mean(bio_age), 1),
    mean_chron_age = round(mean(age), 1),
    mean_accel     = round(mean(age_accel), 1),
    sd_accel       = round(sd(age_accel), 1),
    pct_older      = round(mean(age_accel > 0) * 100, 1)
  )
```
